rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE AMENDMENT AND RESTATEMENT OF THE BESSIE GIN TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Trustee Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Petition For Instructions; Memorandum In Support; And Declaration Of Peter H. Bresler, Esq.
rulings.Rulings: Off calendar in light of settlement, without prejudice to renewing should the conditions of the settlement not be fulfilled. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise opposing parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. Wednesday, June 8, 2016.
